title: Replace fabricated AIS=0.566 with actual measured value
description: AIS=0.566 has no experimental support. Actual measurement is AIS=0.123 (Spearman rho=0.195). LOO-CV R^2 is negative. Replace all occurrences in paper.md and main.tex. Acknowledge zero out-of-sample predictive power.

title: Fix CWD K_d mapping in Table 1
description: Table 1 claims CWD uses 'K_d > 0, Derivative only.' Fitting data shows K_d=0, with 4.71% error achieved via scale=0.5. Revise Table 1 to accurately describe CWD as 'magnitude scaling (factor 0.5)' or 'selective application' rather than derivative control.

title: Resolve Theorem 1 and Propositions 2-3 status
description: Downgrade Theorem 1 to Conjecture/Hypothesis, Propositions 2-3 to Observations. Remove 'Theoretical analysis' from Contribution 4 in Section 1. Fastest path to eliminate desk-rejection risk.

title: Standardize CSI formula and recompute all values
description: Three contradictory CSI formulas exist. Standardize to one formula, document it precisely, and recompute all values from 200-epoch full data. Explain how negative values arise. Replace all CSI references in paper.

title: Complete remaining ImageNet experiments
description: Run NoWD (3 seeds, critical for BEM), SWD (3 seeds), DefazioCorrective (3 seeds), CWD (2 additional seeds) on ImageNet/ResNet-50 90 epochs. Total: 11 runs. With 8 GPUs, approximately 2-3 days.

title: Run CWD halved-lambda ablation
description: FixedWD @ lambda=5e-5 on CIFAR-10 (3 seeds, 200 epochs) + ImageNet (3 seeds, 90 epochs). Approximately 7 GPU-hours. Resolves whether CWD's effect is alignment information or magnitude reduction.

title: Run CPR budget-matched ablation
description: FixedWD @ lambda=2e-4 and lambda=3e-4 on ImageNet (3 seeds each, 90 epochs). Approximately 4 GPU-hours per lambda. Resolves CPR attribution question.

title: Fix UDWDC-v2 BN layer bug
description: Modify UDWDC-v2 to exclude BN layers from the control loop. Re-run CIFAR-10 and CIFAR-100 experiments (3 seeds each). Report corrected WD budget and BEM.

title: Change title to reflect actual scope
description: Replace 'Unified Feedback Control Framework' with a title reflecting that 2/5 methods fail fitting. E.g., 'A PID-Style Taxonomy for Dynamic Weight Decay' or 'Diagnostic Framework for Comparing Dynamic Weight Decay.'

title: Reframe UDWDC as diagnostic probe, not contribution
description: Contribution 2 should read: UDWDC as diagnostic probe demonstrating proportional-only control insufficiency, motivating integral terms. Remove 'proposed method' framing.

title: Replace TikZ schematic Figure 1 with actual data plot
description: Figure 1 currently uses hand-drawn TikZ curves. Replace with actual ratio_trajectories.png from latex/figures/ or regenerate from experimental data.

title: Remove or fix non-significant correlation claims
description: Section 5.7 draws conclusions from p=0.121 and p=0.858 correlations. Either run Steiger's z-test or remove directional claim about cumulative alignment informativeness.

title: Report omitted BEM negative result
description: Add the Bayesian optimization BEM result (EqWD does not beat tuned FixedWD) to the paper. Frame as validation that BEM and accuracy measure orthogonal properties.

title: Standardize population vs sample std
description: Verify all tables use ddof=1 sample standard deviation. Document convention in Section 5.1. Recompute affected Welch's t-tests.

title: Add notation table or fix delta_t/alpha_t inconsistency
description: Section 3.4 references a 'notation table' that does not exist. Either create the table or use alpha_t uniformly with a footnote mapping to Sun et al.'s delta_t.
